tools.name: create_entities
tools.description: Create multiple new entities in the knowledge graph. Each entity has a name, type, and list of observations.

parameters.name: entities
parameters.description: Array of entities to create, each with name, entityType, and observations

tools.name: create_relations
tools.description: Create multiple new relations between entities in the knowledge graph.

parameters.name: relations
parameters.description: Array of relations with from, to, and relationType

tools.name: add_observations
tools.description: Add new observations to existing entities in the knowledge graph.

parameters.name: observations
parameters.description: Array of observations with entityName and contents

tools.name: delete_entities
tools.description: Delete multiple entities and their associated relations from the knowledge graph.

parameters.name: entityNames
parameters.description: Array of entity names to delete

tools.name: delete_observations
tools.description: Delete specific observations from entities in the knowledge graph.

parameters.name: deletions
parameters.description: Array of deletions with entityName and observations to remove

tools.name: delete_relations
tools.description: Delete multiple relations from the knowledge graph.

parameters.name: relations
parameters.description: Array of relations to delete with from, to, and relationType

tools.name: read_graph
tools.description: Read the entire knowledge graph including all entities, relations, and observations.

tools.name: search_nodes
tools.description: Search for nodes in the knowledge graph by name or observation content.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query to match against entity names and observations

tools.name: open_nodes
tools.description: Open specific nodes in the knowledge graph by their names.

parameters.name: names
parameters.description: Array of entity names to retrieve
